footer.tagline: An independent digital studio. Built to last, quietly useful.

hero.subline: An independent digital studio building thoughtful apps that help people stay healthy and finish what they start.

aboutSummary.label: What we do
aboutSummary.body: Di Corporations builds digital products that help people focus on their health and reach the goals that matter to them. We move slowly on purpose — each app is meant to live in your day for years, not weeks.

items.title: Health-first by design
items.body: Health isn't a feature we add — it's the lens every product decision passes through. If a feature could nudge someone in a less healthy direction, it doesn't ship.

items.title: Built to last, not to ship
items.body: Most apps are designed for the first week. We design for the third year. That means fewer features, slower releases, and stricter standards for what stays.

items.title: Quietly useful
items.body: We build software that does its job and then gets out of the way. No streaks that punish you, no manipulative notifications, no dark patterns. Just tools that work.

manifesto.label: Why now
manifesto.body: The web of the last decade was built around one number: time-on-app. Every loop, every notification, every streak was tuned to add another minute. The result is a generation of products that win when their users lose. We don't think that's the future of software. The next decade of apps will be measured by something different — not how long you stayed, but whether your day was a little better for opening them. That is the kind of software we want to make. Quiet. Patient. Designed to be missed when you are away from your phone, not while you are on it.

antiPatterns.label: What we don't build
antiPatterns.heading: The four things we will never ship.

items.title: Streaks that punish
items.body: We don't build features that make a sick day, a busy week, or a real life feel like a failure.

items.title: Notifications that nag
items.body: Every push has to earn its place. Most don't. The default is silence.

items.title: Engagement metrics as success
items.body: We don't measure success by sessions per day. We measure it by whether you reach the goals you set for yourself.

items.title: Dark patterns
items.body: No fake urgency, no confusing unsubscribe flows, no infinite-scroll traps. If a pattern only works because users don't notice it, it isn't shipping.

workPreview.label: Currently building
workPreview.title: BurnBuild
workPreview.description: A fitness companion app for people who want to make exercise a daily habit, not a once-in-a-while sprint. In active development for iOS, Android, and the web.

contactCta.title: Working on something?
contactCta.subline: Project inquiries, partnerships, or just want to chat — we read every email.

about.title: About
about.lede: Di Corporations is an independent digital studio building thoughtful apps for everyday life.
about.missionBody: We believe small, careful software can change the texture of someone's day. Our work focuses on health and the goals people set for themselves — the kind of goals that, kept day after day, change a life. The web is full of software designed to capture attention. We are trying to build the opposite: software designed to give it back.
about.missionQuote: Software that wins when its users win. Nothing else.
about.visionTagline: A future where calm, data-honest software is proven by outcomes, not engagement.
about.visionBody: For the last decade, app success was measured by minutes spent inside it. We measure it by whether the day got better. Every Di Corporations product is evaluated against anonymized cohort outcomes — exercise retention, recovery, focus restored, goal completion. We are working toward a future where one person's day, then a year, and eventually hundreds of thousands of lives get measurably better — one quiet product at a time.

visionFocus.label: Health
visionFocus.body: Measured in months and years, not single days. The basics done well, tracked honestly.

visionFocus.label: Habits
visionFocus.body: Repeatable rhythms tracked across long time horizons — the part of behavior change most apps quit on.

visionFocus.label: Focus
visionFocus.body: Attention is something we give back, not take. Success means our app was opened less, not more.

visionFocus.label: Goals
visionFocus.body: Self-set goals tracked privately and completed at rates that beat industry averages — the data is the proof.

about.originBody: Di Corporations was founded in late 2025 with a single, stubborn question: what would software look like if it were measured by whether your day got better, not by how long you stayed inside it? The first answer is BurnBuild — a fitness companion that treats your year, not your week, as the unit of progress. The studio was born to build that kind of product, and the ones that come after it.

principles.title: Health-first by design
principles.body: We don't build engagement traps. We build tools whose success is measured by whether you live a slightly better day.

principles.title: Built to last, not to ship
principles.body: We'd rather release one careful thing than ten clever ones. Software that survives three years has earned a place on a phone.

principles.title: Quietly useful
principles.body: No streaks that punish you. No notifications begging for attention. Just tools that work the moment you open them, and disappear the moment you close them.

principles.title: Independent on purpose
principles.body: We answer to the people who use our products, not to investors, ad networks, or growth dashboards. That independence is a feature.

about.approachIntro: We work slowly, deliberately, and in public. Three steps, repeated.

approach.title: Listen
approach.body: Before any code, we watch how people actually live their day. The best products start with an honest look at what's already working — and what isn't — without us.

approach.title: Sketch
approach.body: Small prototypes, fast feedback. We build the smallest possible version of an idea and put it in front of real people before we commit.

approach.title: Ship — and keep shipping
approach.body: We release in small, deliberate steps. The product gets sharper with use, not louder. Quiet improvements, year after year.

about.antiBody: We don't take work that depends on dark patterns, engagement-at-any-cost growth, or features whose only purpose is retention. If a project requires us to design against the user's interest, it isn't a project we take.

work.title: Work
work.lede: What we are building, in the open.
work.approachBody: We don't ship for a launch — we ship for the long shape of a product. That changes how we build. We design first for the third year of use, not the first week. We measure success by retention without manipulation. We release slowly because the small details we hold the line on are the ones our users won't notice until they've been with us for a while.

burnbuild.name: BurnBuild
burnbuild.description: BurnBuild is being built for people who want to make exercise a daily habit — not a once-in-a-while sprint. The app focuses on the small, repeatable rhythms that turn a workout into a life. Cross-platform: iOS, Android, and the web. Currently in active development.

highlights.title: Built around the daily, not the dramatic
highlights.body: Most fitness apps celebrate big numbers. BurnBuild celebrates the second week — the part where habits actually form.

highlights.title: Designed for the long stretch
highlights.body: No streaks that punish a sick day. No charts that shame a slow week. The app is meant to still be on your phone three years from now.

highlights.title: Quiet by default
highlights.body: Minimal notifications. No social pressure. The app talks when you ask it to and rests when you don't.

againstGrain.we: we measure consistency over months, not days. Miss a day; it doesn't reset you.
we let you set quiet hours by default and never re-prompt to enable them.
we show you only your own line — a private chart, no comparison.
we keep the interface still, so it stops feeling like a game and starts feeling like a tool.

futureSlot.label: More projects in time.
futureSlot.body: We move slowly on purpose. New work shows up here when it is ready — not before. If you want to know when something does, the best signal is the email at the bottom of this page.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For project inquiries, partnerships, press, or just to say hello — please get in touch. We answer in English or Korean.
contact.responseBody: We aim to respond within two business days. Email is the fastest and most reliable way to reach us.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Di Corporations ("the Studio", "we", "us") respects your privacy. This page describes what data this website collects and how it is handled.

sections.heading: 1. Data we do not collect
sections.body: This website does not require an account, does not host a contact form, and does not run third-party advertising or marketing trackers. We do not sell or share user data.

sections.heading: 2. Data we may collect
sections.body: (a) Anonymized analytics through Vercel Analytics — page paths, country, device type, no personal identifiers. (b) Email correspondence you send to manager@dicorporations.com — used only to reply to you.

sections.heading: 3. Cookies
sections.body: This website does not set tracking cookies. The hosting provider may use technically necessary cookies for security.

sections.heading: 4. Your rights
sections.body: Under applicable laws (including the Personal Information Protection Act of South Korea and GDPR where applicable), you may request access, correction, or deletion of any personal data we hold about you. Contact manager@dicorporations.com to exercise these rights.

sections.heading: 5. Data controller
sections.body: Di Corporations · Business Reg. No. 268-87-03171 · B-439, Songdo Centum Hive, 30-6 Songdo-dong, Yeonsu-gu, Incheon 22007, Republic of Korea · manager@dicorporations.com

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms govern your use of dicorporations.com. By visiting this website, you agree to the terms below.

sections.heading: 1. The website
sections.body: dicorporations.com is the corporate website of Di Corporations. It is provided for informational purposes only and does not constitute an offer of any product or service unless explicitly stated.

sections.heading: 2. Intellectual property
sections.body: All text, graphics, logos, and code on this website are owned by Di Corporations unless otherwise noted. You may not copy, redistribute, or create derivative works without prior written permission.

sections.heading: 3. Third-party links
sections.body: This website may link to external sites. We are not responsible for the content or practices of those sites.

sections.heading: 4. Disclaimer
sections.body: The website is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. To the maximum extent permitted by law, Di Corporations is not liable for any damages arising from your use of the website.

sections.heading: 5. Governing law
sections.body: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Korea, without regard to conflict-of-law principles.
